basics.name: Aman Agarwal
basics.title: Senior Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with proven expertise in scaling React applications to 10M+ users. Specialized in performance optimization (40% improvement), micro-frontend architecture, and developer tooling. Track record of delivering mission-critical features at Paytm while maintaining exceptional user experience.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
experience.description: Working on commerce home experience team to develop full stack application. Debugged and fixed scaling issue impacting 100k transitions per day.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer

teams.name: UPI
highlights: Tech owner of UPI onboarding, UPI Mapper, and Manage UPI IDs pages used by 10+ million users daily.
Enhanced user experience by developing pixel-perfect UI with smooth transitions and performance-oriented pages, ensuring end-to-end integration test coverage.
Improved developer experience by implementing solutions like a VS-Code plugin and TypeScript generics, reducing overall development time by 10%.

teams.name: Core Apptech
highlights: Engineered plugins for Webpack, Vite, and Next.js, improving app performance by 40% for over 50 million users.
Identified performance bottlenecks across various verticals, which helped to improve the performance by 10%.
Built 10+ reusable components, reducing development time by 20%.
Collaborated on research and development of an AI-to-code library.

teams.name: Feeds
highlights: Developed the Daily SIP platform, Spotlight, and Feeds SDK, serving over 1 million active users.
Created a micro-frontend-based SDK using module federation, facilitating seamless integration of live feed UI across Paytm verticals.
Boosted app performance by 27% through effective bundle size reduction.

teams.name: Growth Games
highlights: Built popular games (Spin Wheel, Bear Claw, PCL) reaching 20M+ users.
Engineered game engine optimizing performance across diverse devices.
Implemented smooth animations maintaining 60fps on low-end devices.
Designed an intuitive tutorial library to help users quickly learn and enjoy the games.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Contributed in Optum's prescription platform with telemedicine integration for 100K+ patients. Built real-time appointment scheduling system handling 1K+ daily bookings. Revamped LinkedIn's analytics dashboard UI, enhancing data visibility.

speaking.description: Presented on how to build scalable micro-frontend systems using Webpack Module Federation.
Presented on browser rendering pipeline, compositing layers, and achieving smooth 60fps animations.
